title: Nymphona lutea

Nymphona lutea is also known as the yellow milkberry, due to its clusters of yellow flowers. The exact classification of Nymphona lutea is still being researched and updated in botanical literature. Further study is needed to confirm its classification within the broader plant kingdom.

The roots of the plant are said to have antimicrobial properties, making them useful for treating infections and wounds. In some cultures, Nymphona lutea is also used to treat fever and rheumatism.
